tasks.title: Feature: conversations (3 endpoints: GET, POST)
tasks.description:
Generate the COMPLETE NestJS module for 'conversations' with ALL layers:
- Controller (all 3 endpoints)
- Service (business logic)
- DTOs (request/response types)
- Guards (JWT auth where needed)
- Validators (input validation)
- Module registration

Endpoints:
  POST /api/v1/conversations/{conversationId}/messages — Send a text message
  GET /api/v1/conversations/{conversationId}/messages — List messages with formatted text metadata
  POST /api/v1/conversations/{conversationId}/messages/location — Share location in a conversation

tasks.title: Feature: messages (9 endpoints: DELETE, GET, PATCH, POST, PUT)
tasks.description:
Generate the COMPLETE NestJS module for 'messages' with ALL layers:
- Controller (all 9 endpoints)
- Service (business logic)
- DTOs (request/response types)
- Guards (JWT auth where needed)
- Validators (input validation)
- Module registration

Endpoints:
  POST /api/v1/messages/voice — Send a voice message
  DELETE /api/v1/messages/{messageId} — Nachricht loeschen
  PUT /api/v1/messages/{messageId} — Edit a sent message
  POST /api/v1/messages/{messageId}/forward — Forward a message
  POST /api/v1/messages — Send a message with optional quote
  POST /api/v1/messages/{messageId}/reactions — Add an emoji reaction to a message
  GET /api/v1/messages/{messageId}/reactions — List emoji reactions for a message
  DELETE /api/v1/messages/{messageId}/reactions/{reactionId} — Remove an emoji reaction from a message
  PATCH /api/v1/messages/{messageId}/self-destruct — Update self-destruct policy for a message

tasks.title: Feature: media (2 endpoints: GET, POST)
tasks.description:
Generate the COMPLETE NestJS module for 'media' with ALL layers:
- Controller (all 2 endpoints)
- Service (business logic)
- DTOs (request/response types)
- Guards (JWT auth where needed)
- Validators (input validation)
- Module registration

Endpoints:
  POST /api/v1/media — Upload encrypted media for view-once use
  GET /api/v1/media/{mediaId}/view-once — Retrieve and consume view-once media

tasks.title: Feature: chats (3 endpoints: POST, PUT)
tasks.description:
Generate the COMPLETE NestJS module for 'chats' with ALL layers:
- Controller (all 3 endpoints)
- Service (business logic)
- DTOs (request/response types)
- Guards (JWT auth where needed)
- Validators (input validation)
- Module registration

Endpoints:
  PUT /api/v1/chats/{chatId}/lock — Lock a chat with additional authentication
  PUT /api/v1/chats/{chatId}/unlock — Unlock a chat with additional authentication
  POST /api/v1/chats/{chatId}/messages — Share a contact in a chat

tasks.title: Feature: broadcast-lists (6 endpoints: DELETE, GET, POST, PUT)
tasks.description:
Generate the COMPLETE NestJS module for 'broadcast-lists' with ALL layers:
- Controller (all 6 endpoints)
- Service (business logic)
- DTOs (request/response types)
- Guards (JWT auth where needed)
- Validators (input validation)
- Module registration

Endpoints:
  POST /api/v1/broadcast-lists — Create a broadcast list
  GET /api/v1/broadcast-lists — List broadcast lists
  GET /api/v1/broadcast-lists/{broadcastListId} — Get broadcast list details
  PUT /api/v1/broadcast-lists/{broadcastListId} — Update broadcast list
  DELETE /api/v1/broadcast-lists/{broadcastListId} — Delete broadcast list
  POST /api/v1/broadcast-lists/{broadcastListId}/messages — Send broadcast message
